inputs.label: Mass of Absorbing Material
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the material that absorbs the radiation energy.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of the material that absorbs the radiation energy.
businessContext_i18n.de: Masse des Materials, das die Strahlungsenergie absorbiert.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse du matériau qui absorbe l'énergie du rayonnement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa del material que absorbe la energía de radiación.

inputs.label: Total Energy Deposited
inputs.businessContext: Total energy deposited by ionizing radiation into the material.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total energy deposited by ionizing radiation into the material.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İyonlaştırıcı radyasyon tarafından malzemede biriktirilen toplam enerji.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte durch ionisierende Strahlung im Material deponierte Energie.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Énergie totale déposée par le rayonnement ionisant dans le matériau.
businessContext_i18n.es: Energía total depositada por la radiación ionizante en el material.
Duración de la exposición a la radiación.

inputs.label: Material Density
inputs.businessContext: Density of the absorbing material (e.g., water = 1000 kg/m³).

businessContext_i18n.en: Density of the absorbing material (e.g., water = 1000 kg/m³).
businessContext_i18n.de: Dichte des absorbierenden Materials (z. B. Wasser = 1000 kg/m³).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Densité du matériau absorbant (ex. eau = 1000 kg/m³).
businessContext_i18n.es: Densidad del material absorbente (ej., agua = 1000 kg/m³).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
